description: Irish republican paramilitary group formed in 2012 from a merger of the Real IRA, Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD), and other small militant groups. It is the largest dissident republican group, active mainly in Northern Ireland, and has launched attacks against British security forces. The group is designated as a terrorist organization by the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: In February 2014, the group sent seven letter bombs to British Army recruitment offices in south-east England; the first time republicans had struck in Britain since 2001.
country_links.context: The New IRA sent letter bombs to British Army recruitment offices in south-east England and attacked PSNI and British Army targets in Northern Ireland.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 30 June 2023, the United States added the New IRA into the list of Foreign Terrorist Organisations.
country_links.context: The United States added the New IRA to its list of Foreign Terrorist Organisations.
